default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website SEO strategies, visitor tracking, and lead generation improvements for Firework.](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Implementing new visitor tracking tool to capture 1-2% of visitor data without form submission](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Dynamic lead magnet allocation based on blog categories to be developed](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Investigating recent drop in form submissions from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Pixel implementation and data collection to begin this week](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

## Topics

### Visitor Tracking Implementation

  - [New tool captures visitor data (name, email, company) without form submission](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Typically tracks 1-2% of visitors due to various technical constraints](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [More efficient and cost-effective than previous solutions](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Expected to capture data for 20-30 people weekly from \~1000 blog visitors](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Dynamic Lead Magnet Allocation

  - [Plan to dynamically push visitors to different landing pages based on ICP targeting](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Cameron to develop automated system assigning lead magnets based on blog categories](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Initial approach: Add fields in Webflow CMS to override default CTA/lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Advanced version: Automate lead magnet selection based on blog category tags](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Pratik to provide spreadsheet mapping blogs to appropriate lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### Blog Conversion Rate Analysis

  - [Recent decline in form submissions (only 1 contact from blogs last week)](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Pratik to investigate:](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
    1.  Changes in blog visitor numbers
    2.  Performance of lead magnets and CTAs
    3.  User journey and form submission locations

### Website Pixel Implementation

  - [Discussed briefly; needs to be implemented this week](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Team to start reading data from the pixel immediately after implementation](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pratik: Investigate drop in blog form submissions; share findings with Ritesh and Cameron before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Pratik: Create spreadsheet mapping blogs to appropriate lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Cameron: Develop automated lead magnet allocation system based on blog categories](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Team: Implement website pixel and begin data collection this week](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Cameron: Reschedule future meetings to start one hour later (accommodating time zones)](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Continue discussions on Slack regarding action items, conversion data, and upcoming blog publications](https://fathom.video/share/FPFnzS6Xu4i_2msbAtU81PqErktx385T?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

action_items.description: Send document with details on website visitor tracking tool to Ritesh and Cameron
Investigate drop in form submissions. Analyze visitor numbers, CTA effectiveness, user journey
Share form submission analysis results with Ritesh and Cameron before next call
Create spreadsheet mapping blog articles to appropriate lead magnets for dynamic lead addition
Implement automated lead magnet assignment based on blog categories
Allocate existing lead magnets across different blog categories for dynamic lead addition feature
